# CWE-1322 vulnerable: blocking sleep in async worker
lang: go
file: CWE-1322-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1322: Use of Blocking Code in Single-threaded, Non-blocking Context.
// Vulnerable: event loop goroutine calls time.Sleep while draining webhook queue.

import (
	"net/http"
	"time"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

func StartWebhookWorker(db *gorm.DB) gin.HandlerFunc {
	queue := make(chan string, 32)
	go func() {
		for payload := range queue {
			time.Sleep(2 * time.Second)
			_ = db.Exec("INSERT INTO webhook_events (payload) VALUES (?)", payload).Error
		}
	}()
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		body := c.PostForm("payload")
		queue <- body
		c.JSON(http.StatusAccepted, gin.H{"queued": true})
	}
}
